pattern: One coordinator thread deciding who owns each index — then handing the token to exactly one worker and waiting for it back — scales turn-taking to four mutually exclusive roles.
hints: Each of the four threads must know exactly how many times it will act for a given n, or it will never terminate.
Let the number thread own the loop over 1..n: for each i it either prints (i not divisible) or wakes exactly one specialist.
Whichever specialist prints returns the token to the number thread — one open semaphore for the coordinator, three closed ones for the specialists.

edge_inputs.description: n = 1 — three of four threads never print
n = 15 — the fizzbuzz index must not double-print fizz and buzz
n = 30 — two full cycles under jitter
n = 7 — ends on a plain number

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [rng.randint(1, max(1, min(size, 30)))]
